/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libms_server_profiler.so -o libms_server_profiler.so CMakeFiles/ms_server_profiler.dir/src/msServerProfiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ms_server_profiler.dir/src/msServerProfilerMarker.cpp.o   -L/home/raonaxin/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64  -L/home/raonaxin/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/aarch64-linux/devlib  -L/home/raonaxin/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/x86_64-linux/devlib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/raonaxin/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64:/home/raonaxin/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/aarch64-linux/devlib:/home/raonaxin/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/x86_64-linux/devlib: -lascendcl -lmsprofiler -ldl
